non_circular: conventional LA values label records only; no value is a model input; held-out (LOTO) survivability is CITED from the frozen gate, not re-run.

definitions.SEED_A: independently secure: value-bearing external referent, firm/primary, NOT shape-only, corroborated by >=1 other independent anchor AND empirically held-out-survivable
definitions.SEED_B: plausible-disputed: firm primary external referent but one-anchor-deep / fails empirical LOTO
definitions.SEED_C: exploratory: hedged/cf/secondary referents, single-sign glosses, or relative-only value-bearing residue
definitions.SEED_X: circular or excluded: shape-homomorphy (==value), Cypriot value-inheritance, value-blind onomastic resemblance, or asserts-no-value internal variation
definitions.HARD_RULE: a shape match alone can NEVER be SEED_A

why_SEED_A_is_zero: No record clears the empirical gate. The 6 firm primary toponym equations are SEED_B: even the signs pinned by >=2 distinct firm referents (['I', 'KI', 'RI', 'TO']) collapse under the cited frozen LOTO gate, which recovers only {I,RI} and each one-toponym-deep. Shape-homomorphy (57 records) and Cypriot (11) are SEED_X by the hard rule and by value-inheritance; personal names (25) are SEED_X (value-blind).

reasons: firm primary external referent (Phaistos); signs ['PA', 'I', 'TO'] incl. corroborated ['I', 'TO']
